channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Kevin Warsh sworn in as Fed chair, as traders forecast rate hikes in 2026
item.description: US President Donald Trump has repeatedly said he wants the Federal Reserve to lower interest rates, but investors forecast no chance of a rate cut in 2026.

item.title: JUST IN: Nasdaq Bitcoin Index options granted approval by SEC, Bloomberg reports 🇺🇸 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9SRVhhMWIyeDJ4YmlvbkJTREZNVV9JQnNBM190ZlAtWUl4Y0hRNmtrUFQxdU1qa2RDX3l4WkVodXpKRUhwU0Zlc0t5VzM0VEkzZmlFNkpiNV8yZlNFTkFxc0xwVmxlTms?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Nasdaq Bitcoin Ind…

item.title: Kash Patel-Linked Apparel Store Goes Dark After Pushing Crypto-Stealing Malware
item.description: User losses weren’t immediately clear.

item.title: SEC Delays Tokenized Stocks Innovation Exemption Amid Concerns: Bloomberg
item.description: The SEC’s expected regulatory framework would have provided clarity for companies looking to tokenize traditional assets like stocks.

item.title: Microsoft's Free AI Just Beat OpenAI and Google at Browsing the Web
item.description: Fara1.5 is a family of open-weight browser agents from Microsoft Research that outperforms OpenAI's Operator and Google's Gemini 2.5 Computer Use on the industry's toughest live-web benchmark.

item.title: Kalshi Debuts 'Fair Markets' Lobby Group as Congress Opens Insider Trading Probe
item.description: Kalshi unveiled Americans for Fair Markets, an advocacy group to help shape policymakers’ perception of prediction markets.

item.title: Two Men Federally Charged Over AI Deepfake Porn Under the Take It Down Act
item.description: Federal prosecutors charged two men under the 2025 law that criminalizes non-consensual AI-generated intimate imagery.

item.title: F2Pool founder who controls 11% of bitcoin's hashrate to lead first SpaceX mission to Mars
item.description: Chun Wang, the first Mission Commander for SpaceX’s first commercial spaceflight to Mars, is crucial for the future transport of millions of tons of cargo and a million citizens to the Red Planet.

item.title: Robinhood Crypto COO Tanya Denisova is leaving company amid revenue slowdown
item.description: Robinhood Crypto COO Tanya Denisova is leaving the firm after more than five years, as the trading platform navigates a sharp decline in crypto revenue and works to lessen its dependence on digital asset market cycles.

item.title: Price predictions 5/22: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
item.description: Bitcoin sold off to $76,000, giving bears an opportunity to reclaim control of the crypto market. Meanwhile, altcoins like HYPE charted new highs.

item.title: Bitcoin Billionaire Books First SpaceX Mars Mission
item.description: F2Pool co-founder Chun Wang plans a Starship flyby of Mars, before SpaceX attempts to land humans on the surface.

item.title: JUST IN: SEC delays plans to allow “crypto versions” of U.S. stocks. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFA5dFVobHdPcFo4WEhKalpWX0Z2NEJCNHVwYnQwRjFkd2w1WXJud2dRSzFmRE1qSzVCT0YzcXBTV0ozaHptODBlRWY0WmJxVFctbkIzQkpxQ3UwOHExaXR0Yw?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: SEC delays plans to allow “…

item.title: GameStop Seeks to Boost Share Count as eBay Pursuit Continues After Rejection
item.description: Gaming retailer GameStop wants to add 1.5 billion shares to its authorized share count as it seeks to maximize financial flexibility.

item.title: SEC Commissioner Peirce counters views that crypto rule will foster synthetic tokens
item.description: Hester Peirce, the commissioner behind the SEC's Crypto Task Force, made statements on the now-delayed proposal, perhaps tamping down mistaken beliefs.

item.title: OFAC and Crypto Crime: Every OFAC Specially Designated National with Identified Cryptocurrency Addresses
item.description: As far back as the early 1800s, the U.S. Department of the Treasury has issued economic sanctions to achieve foreign… The post OFAC and Crypto Crime: Every OFAC Specially Designated National with Identified Cryptocurrency Addresses appeare…

item.title: Why Minnesota is empowering local banks to fight Wall Street for crypto revenue
item.description: A local banker told CoinDesk that in light of Wall Street’s aggressive push into the crypto industry, Minnesota's financial institutions could not afford to remain on the sidelines.

item.title: Crypto, Banks, Policy Experts Press Congress to Modernize Bank Secrecy Act
item.description: A House subcommittee hearing exposed a divide over how far to scale back the 1970-era anti-money laundering law as Trump expands its reach.

item.title: US House lawmakers launch probe into Kalshi, Polymarket insider trading
item.description: Representative James Comer asked CEOs of two major prediction market companies for information on their responses to insider trading after “suspiciously timed trades” related to US military actions against Iran.

item.title: NEAR protocol leads AI token rally with a 50% pump: Is $5 NEAR price next?
item.description: NEAR price surges 50% in a week as AI token momentum, Nvidia optimism and network upgrades fuel bullish sentiment.

item.title: Crypto Is Growing Up—Why Some Everyday Traders Are Moving On
item.description: Muted volatility, political shifts, and Wall Street dominance are driving increasingly jaded retail traders out of crypto.

item.title: Tom Emmer brushes off law enforcement concerns over Clarity Act
item.description: House Majority Whip Tom Emmer said concerns from law enforcement groups about crypto developer protections are being overstated.

item.title: Crypto Biz: Institutions tighten their grip on Bitcoin, AI and prediction markets
item.description: Institutional crypto adoption accelerates as Tether expands Bitcoin holdings, miners pivot to AI and Polymarket joins Nasdaq amid $1 billion fund outflows.

item.title: Trump Media Moves Over $200 Million in Bitcoin as Losses Pile Up: Arkham
item.description: It's unknown whether Trump Media & Technology Group is selling its Bitcoin, though it has amassed sizable losses on its holdings.

item.title: Bitcoin price falls under $77K as Dow Jones hits new all-time highs
item.description: Bitcoin headed lower as Wall Street trading began with new record highs for the Dow Jones, while traders warned of weak US demand.

item.title: Congress hits Polymarket and Kalshi with a massive insider trading probe
item.description: Rep. James Comer is demanding internal records from the prediction market CEOs, warning that government employees could be using classified information to make “huge profits”.

item.title: NYSE Parent, OKX Counter Hyperliquid With Regulated Oil Perpetual Futures
item.description: OKX debuted perpetual oil futures tied to Intercontinental Exchange’s benchmarks, the latest sign of growing competition for Hyperliquid.

item.title: The agentic CFO in your pocket
item.description: Chalom explains that retail investors have never had the opportunity to access and manage their own digital treasury desk. Until now.

item.title: NYSE owner ICE to launch oil-linked futures with OKX
item.description: ICE and OKX plan to launch oil-linked perpetual futures based on Brent and WTI benchmarks, bringing crypto derivatives further into traditional energy markets under licensing restrictions.

item.title: House Republicans Open Investigation Into Kalshi, Polymarket Over Insider Trading
item.description: The chair of the powerful House Oversight Committee has requested documents from Polymarket and Kalshi regarding insider trading and war-related markets.

item.title: Bitcoin miner MARA spent $4.3M on CEO security in 2025 as crypto attacks rise
item.description: MARA spent $4.3 million on CEO Fred Thiel’s security in 2025, including vehicle armoring, as crypto wrench attacks increased globally.

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin heads lower late Friday as Warsh takes over at Fed
item.description: Kevin Warsh was sworn in as Fed chairman in a White House ceremony early Friday afternoon.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Space X IPO: 'Bad news' for tech stocks but what about Bitcoin?
item.description: SpaceX’s IPO could turn the Mag 7 into a Mag 8, with Tesla and SpaceX comprising 25% of the group's Bitcoin balance-sheet exposure.

item.title: DeFi hacks shake institutional confidence as risks outpace yields
item.description: Repeated bridge exploits and shrinking yields are making institutions question whether DeFi’s risks still justify the returns, says Symbiotic’s Putiatin.

item.title: THORChain exploit tied to malicious node and GG20 flaw
item.description: The $10.7 million THORChain exploit was caused by a GG20 vulnerability, which allowed a malicious node to reconstruct a full private key to one of its vaults.

item.title: IREN co-founder says AI’s biggest bottleneck is infrastructure, not chips
item.description: Dan Roberts outlines IREN’s strategy to build a vertically integrated AI platform spanning power, data centers, GPUs and enterprise software.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: NEAR surges 19.4% as index trades flat
item.description: Internet Computer (ICP), up 4.3% from Thursday, joined NEAR Protocol (NEAR) as a top performer.

item.title: Trump Media moved but 'did not sell' $205 million in bitcoin amid rising losses on crypto bets
item.description: DJT’s bitcoin strategy remains under pressure as the company sits on hundreds of millions in unrealized crypto losses and widening quarterly deficits.

item.title: Morning Minute: Mark Cuban Sells His Bitcoin
item.description: The billionaire cited underperformance vs gold and broader disappointment with crypto's breakout apps (or lack thereof) as drivers.

item.title: Tom Lee says trillions in tech IPO supply won't crash the S&P 500
item.description: Fundstrat’s Tom Lee argues that trillions in new IPO supply from SpaceX, Anthropic, and OpenAI could ultimately be absorbed by underallocated investors.

item.title: Crypto mogul CZ's attorney starting own firm - and AI will play a major role in its business model trib.al/Kcj1Ngs - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE95a3Jnd3ZMUWNCelpFcHZIWDdpUmwwMGY3eEFsZ0RjSmlZbU1HZTFsNTBJc2lBVkM0bXFJazVkNGVKRnJFeWhJdldJYzUtY1NOU3hzZU84RFpSVFk?oc=5" target="_blank">Crypto mogul CZ's attorney starting own fir…

item.title: OKX and ICE are bringing 'never-expiring' oil futures to 120 million crypto users
item.description: The new partnership comes as Hyperliquid’s oli futures contracts that never expire have been a huge success with over $1.6 billion in 24-hour trading volume.

item.title: Polymarket Hit By ‘Internal Top-Up’ Wallet Exploit, $700K Drained
item.description: User funds remain safe after the incident, the prediction market platform said, with contracts and core infrastructure unaffected.

item.title: XRP adds 4,300 new wallets in 24 hours, but why is price stuck?
item.description: XRP Ledger activity surges with 4,300 new wallets created in 24 hours, but strong resistance keeps XRP price capped.

item.title: Bitcoin left behind in the geopolitical melee
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 22, 2026

item.title: NEAR Protocol Jumps 28% on Privacy, AI, and Scaling Upgrades
item.description: NEAR rallied by 45% this week on a series of upgrades positioning it as a potential settlement layer for AI agents and confidential finance.

item.title: Polymarket seeks Japan entry despite gambling law hurdles: Report
item.description: Polymarket is reportedly seeking entry into Japan amid falling trading volumes and rising regulatory scrutiny, targeting approval by 2030.

item.title: Ark Invest buys $12.5 million of Bullish stock in four days
item.description: Ark frequently uses broader digital asset downturns, which tend to pull crypto equities lower, as an entry point into cryptocurrency companies.

item.title: Polymarket Taps Jupiter Exec to Lead Japan Push: Report
item.description: The prediction market has reportedly appointed a representative in Japan as it aims to secure authorization to operate there by 2030.

item.title: Crypto majors stuck in tight range as altcoin rotation picks up steam
item.description: Bitcoin holds between $76,000 and $78,000 while AI tokens and HYPE surge; derivatives signal calm conditions with volatility selling dominating options markets.

item.title: Polymarket team says user funds safe as exploit losses climb above $600K
item.description: Polymarket said user funds and market resolution were safe after a suspected private key compromise tied to top-up operations.

item.title: ZachXBT flags $520K Polymarket exploit on Polygon, team says funds are safe
item.description: Blockchain investigator ZachXBT has highlighted a suspected security breach involving Polymarket, the world’s largest decentralized prediction market platform.

item.title: Verus bridge exploiter returns $8.5M after bounty offer
item.description: The hacker behind the Verus bridge exploit returned 75% of the stolen funds as part of a recovery deal negotiated with the protocol days after the incident.

item.title: Near Protocol to automate its own growth and its token is skyrocketing
item.description: Near Protocol will introduce dynamic resharding in June, allowing the blockchain to automatically add shards as demand grows without human intervention.

item.title: Polymarket aims for prediction market approval in Japan by 2030
item.description: Mike Eidlin, head of Japan at cryptocurrency exchange Jupiter, is leading Polymarket's efforts, according to reports.

item.title: Bitcoin implied volatility drops to 7 month low despite macro risks
item.description: BTC's implied volatility is a picture of calm even as financial headlines warn of macro risks.

item.title: Bitcoin price record 90-day uptrend 'resembles bull market rally:' New analysis
item.description: Bitcoin rallied for 90 days after its dip below $60,000, breaking the record for the longest uptrend within a bear market in BTC price history.

item.title: Hamilton ETFs files for leveraged Bitcoin income ETF in Canada
item.description: The proposed fund would use covered-call and short-term options strategies designed to generate monthly income alongside Bitcoin exposure through a leveraged structure.

item.title: UAE-backed DDSC stablecoin processes $30M institutional transaction
item.description: The transfer was executed on ADI Chain, a layer-2 blockchain designed for institutional payments, treasury operations and trade settlement.

item.title: Tokenized stocks risk liquidity and revenue fragmentation: Research
item.description: TradFi views the breakup of its previously consolidated, centralized liquidity as a “serious structural threat,” said Tiger Research director Ryan Yoon.
